signals.text: Claude 4 Sonnet benchmarks leak ahead of official launch, showing strong coding and reasoning gains over prior generation.
Operator API for autonomous agents enters public beta; early adopters report 40% task completion rates on complex workflows.
DeepSeek-V3 weights released under MIT license, sparking immediate fine-tune wave across HuggingFace.
EU regulators open preliminary inquiry into Perplexity's publisher content practices; company says it will cooperate.
SmolLM3 series drops — sub-1B models that outperform GPT-3.5 on select benchmarks, optimized for edge devices.

winner.name: Anthropic
winner.text: Anthropic is having a week — leaked benchmarks, bullish analyst notes, and a suspiciously timed coffee sponsorship at NeurIPS.

loser.name: Perplexity
loser.text: Perplexity managed to annoy European regulators and publishers simultaneously, a rare double achievement in self-inflicted PR damage.
